description:
Conduct comprehensive internet research covering business context, regulatory requirements, alternative products/approaches, and technical documentation for SlashOps.

Output: .bot/workspace/product/research-internet.md
name: Deep Internet Research for SlashOps
steps: Read product.md for project name and goals
Research business context, regulatory landscape, and compliance requirements
Identify alternative products, competing approaches, and industry benchmarks
Gather technical documentation, API references, and integration patterns
acceptance_criteria: Business context and market landscape documented
